events.venue: OSHO International Meditation Resort, 17 Koregaon Park, Pune, Maharashtra
events.description: Meditative therapy using gibberish to clean the mind.
events.full_text:
OSHO No-Mind - 7 Days

An OSHO Meditative Therapy where we use gibberish to clean the mind through a passionate dialog with existence, in any nonsense language, allowing a great silence to arise from within.

Jul 3 - 9, 2026 ~ with Satyam

events.title: OSHO Active Meditations In-Depth - 2 Days
events.venue: OSHO International Meditation Resort, 17 Koregaon Park, Pune, Maharashtra
events.description: Understand and explore depths of OSHO Active Meditations.
events.full_text:
OSHO Active Meditations In-Depth - 2 Days

Understand, discover and explore the depths of OSHO Active Meditations. Your approach to meditation, and your understanding of the key points of each meditation, can make all the difference – both in your experience and in the benefits you take away.

"Before you start doing a technique, be fully alert that you have understood it. Each technique is for bringing about a revolution in you. First try to understand the technique absolutely rightly." – Osho

Jul 4 - 5, 2026 ~ with Richa, Raja

events.title: OSHO Active Meditations In-Depth & Facilitating - 3 Days
events.venue: OSHO International Meditation Resort, 17 Koregaon Park, Pune, Maharashtra
events.description: Learn skills to share OSHO Active Meditations with others.
events.full_text:
OSHO Active Meditations In-Depth & Facilitating - 3 Days

Gain the skills and confidence to share OSHO Active Meditations with others. Enjoy deepening your own understanding of the main OSHO Active Meditations and learn the skills, gain the confidence to introduce them to others.

"Each technique is for bringing about a revolution in you. First try to understand the technique absolutely rightly." – Osho

Jul 4 - 6, 2026 ~ with Richa, Raja

events.title: Healing Sounds - 1 Day
events.venue: OSHO International Meditation Resort, 17 Koregaon Park, Pune, Maharashtra
events.description: Connection between voice, emotion and energy exploration.
events.full_text:
Healing Sounds - 1 Day

A powerful experience of the connection between voice, emotion and energy. A space where you can fall in love with your own voice; learning to use your body as a natural musical instrument. A playful exploration of the range of your vocal expression and a deepening awareness of its connection to your emotions and bodily energies. A playful atmosphere allows spontaneity and joy and brings a natural healing to your bodymind.

"The meeting of silence and sound is music." – Osho

Jul 5, 2026 ~ with Sadhana

events.title: Inner Skills – Living with Totality - 1 Day
events.venue: OSHO International Meditation Resort, 17 Koregaon Park, Pune, Maharashtra
events.description: Living with totality as key to happiness and joy.
events.full_text:
Inner Skills – Living with Totality - 1 Day

Living with totality is one of the keys to happiness and joy. But how to be total when there are things to do that we don't enjoy doing – at home, at work, or when we just don't have the energy? In this course we address these issues and discover that being total doesn't have to mean that we end up being workaholics, obsessed with doing.

Jul 7, 2026 ~ with Sakshi

events.title: Family Constellation - 1 Day
events.venue: OSHO International Meditation Resort, 17 Koregaon Park, Pune, Maharashtra
events.description: Uncover hidden family patterns shaping your relationships.
events.full_text:
Family Constellation - 1 Day

Uncover the hidden family patterns shaping your relationships and inner world. Family Constellation is a meditative and illuminating journey that unveils the hidden patterns within your family system, patterns that continue to shape your emotional and energetic landscape. Often, without conscious awareness, we bear the burdens and unresolved sorrows of those who came before us – echoes of generational pain woven into our being. You are invited to gently disentangle from what does not belong to you, creating space for your own life to blossom.

"Humanity is passing through a very critical phase. It has to be decided whether we want to live according to the past or we want to live a new style of life. It is enough! We have tried the past and its patterns and they have all failed. The time is ripe to get out of the grip of the past and to create a new style of life on the earth." – Osho

Jul 8, 2026 ~ with Ambu

events.title: OSHO Mystic Rose - 21 Days
events.venue: OSHO International Meditation Resort, 17 Koregaon Park, Pune, Maharashtra
events.description: Revolutionary meditative therapy: laughter, crying, witnessing.
events.full_text:
OSHO Mystic Rose - 21 Days

This revolutionary, life changing meditative therapy takes place three hours a day for three weeks: the first week is laughter, the second crying, and the third silent witnessing.

Jul 11 - 31, 2026 ~ with Asmita, Sahajo

events.title: Breath Energy - 1 Day
events.venue: OSHO International Meditation Resort, 17 Koregaon Park, Pune, Maharashtra
events.description: Awaken breath energy and inner source through awareness.
events.full_text:
Breath Energy - 1 Day

Awaken your breath energy, your inner source. Discover the intimate connection between your breath, your bodymind, your emotions, and your being. Breath is so much more than oxygen – it is your bridge to the present moment, to feeling fully alive. You are invited to explore the silent power of your breath, to use it as a portal to access deeper awareness, love, and healing. Conscious Connected Breathing, emotional release and heart-centered sharing will all help you begin to rediscover the joy of simply being.

"If you can become the master of your breathing – and it is a deep science – you become master of your emotions." – Osho

Jul 12, 2026 ~ with Devendra

events.title: OSHO Self-Hypnosis for Meditation - 7 Days
events.venue: OSHO International Meditation Resort, 17 Koregaon Park, Pune, Maharashtra
events.description: Unlock unconscious power to support meditation and transformation.
events.full_text:
OSHO Self-Hypnosis for Meditation - 7 Days

Unlock the power of your unconscious to support your meditation and transformation. In this 7-day early morning course (7:30 - 8:30 am daily), you will be gently guided into the art of self-hypnosis – a powerful gateway to deep relaxation and transformation. Through subtle shifts in awareness and intention, you will access the vast, hidden resources of your unconscious and learn how to plant seeds of clarity and change. As your unconscious becomes an ally, meditation blossoms effortlessly. Trust deepens, relaxation arises naturally, and insight unfolds without struggle.

"The secret of hypnosis is that it takes you to the unconscious, and then you can put the seed of anything in the unconscious, and it will grow, blossom. The blossoming will happen in the conscious, but the roots will remain in the unconscious." – Osho

Jul 12 - 18, 2026 ~ with Richa

events.title: Inner Skills – Stress, Relaxation, Communication - 1 Day
events.venue: OSHO International Meditation Resort, 17 Koregaon Park, Pune, Maharashtra
events.description: Strategies and techniques to remain relaxed and centered.
events.full_text:
Inner Skills – Stress, Relaxation, Communication - 1 Day

Strategies and techniques to help you remain, relaxed, centred and aware even in demanding situations – at home and at work.

Jul 14, 2026 ~ with Sakshi

events.title: Meditation in Everyday Life - Morning Mini Course
events.venue: OSHO International Meditation Resort, 17 Koregaon Park, Pune, Maharashtra
events.description: Small acts filled with awareness, joy, and fulfillment.
events.full_text:
Meditation in Everyday Life - Morning Mini Course

Life is made of small acts – having a cup of tea or taking a shower, meeting a friend or working in the office… And these acts can be full of tremendous awareness, joy, fulfillment…

Jul 15, 2026 ~ with Sadhana

events.title: OSHO Born Again - 7 Days
events.venue: OSHO International Meditation Resort, 17 Koregaon Park, Pune, Maharashtra
events.description: Rediscover freshness, wonder, and innocence of childhood.
events.full_text:
OSHO Born Again - 7 Days

This OSHO Meditative Therapy helps us rediscover the freshness, wonder, and innocence of childhood.

Jul 17 - 23, 2026 ~ with Satyam, Maneesh

events.title: OSHO Zen Tarot - 1 Day
events.venue: OSHO International Meditation Resort, 17 Koregaon Park, Pune, Maharashtra
events.description: Awaken intuitive insight with OSHO Zen Tarot cards.
events.full_text:
OSHO Zen Tarot - 1 Day

Awaken your intuitive insight with OSHO Zen Tarot. Using OSHO Zen Tarot cards, this is an opportunity to develop our intuition from the perspective of the here and now – the perspective of Zen. Where traditional tarot often looks to the past or tries to predict the future, OSHO Zen Tarot brings us into the present moment. Rooted in the wisdom of Zen, these cards reflect our inner world – our thoughts, feelings, and energies – as they are right now. They become a mirror, helping us to see what we might not yet recognize, and offering insight and clarity without judgment.

"If you have looked meditatively at the Tarot card … And they are cards to be meditated upon; they are old secret methods of meditation." – Osho

Jul 18, 2026 ~ with Sadhana

events.title: Trauma Healing - 1 Day
events.venue: OSHO International Meditation Resort, 17 Koregaon Park, Pune, Maharashtra
events.description: Beyond trauma - a life of freedom and healing.
events.full_text:
Trauma Healing - 1 Day

Beyond trauma – a life of freedom. Are you burdened by feelings of powerlessness? Do you sometimes feel like the victim of forces beyond your control? Do you often feel resentful, anxious, guilty? Do you find you can't trust yourself not to blindly overreact in certain situations? These are the effects of past trauma, embedded in the nervous system, and can be released. Healing is possible.

"Medicine heals the body, meditation heals your soul. But their function is the same – healing." – Osho

Jul 19, 2026 ~ with Richa

events.title: Inner Skills – Playing with Change - 1 Day
events.venue: OSHO International Meditation Resort, 17 Koregaon Park, Pune, Maharashtra
events.description: Playful awareness keeps you flexible and responsive.
events.full_text:
Inner Skills – Playing with Change - 1 Day

Change is constant and a playful awareness will keep you flexible and responsive.

Jul 21, 2026 ~ with Sakshi

events.title: Breath of Life - Morning Mini Course
events.venue: OSHO International Meditation Resort, 17 Koregaon Park, Pune, Maharashtra
events.description: Reconnect with vital energy through breath and movement.
events.full_text:
Breath of Life - Morning Mini Course

Reconnect with your vital energy through breath, movement, and mindful awareness. This is an invitation to wake up the natural energy that flows through you with every breath – to celebrate your aliveness. Through conscious breathing, joyful movement, and meditative awareness, you will reconnect with the vibrancy that is your true nature. Tensions will melt, emotions will be released, and your life energy will begin to move freely again. Come alive … and then more alive!

"Celebration means dropping this whole trip of becoming – just being here. When becoming disappears, all the smoke of becoming disappears, there is the flame of being, and that very flame is celebration." – Osho

Jul 22, 2026 ~ with Devendra

events.title: OSHOBA The Drum Beat Meditation - 3 Days
events.venue: OSHO International Meditation Resort, 17 Koregaon Park, Pune, Maharashtra
events.description: No-Mind experience of sound, silence, and letting go.
events.full_text:
OSHOBA The Drum Beat Meditation - 3 Days

The No-Mind experience of sound, silence, and letting go. Your heart begins to leap, your energy soars, expands and moves freely as you center yourself and dance with OSHOBA. Through rhythm and stillness, something within you takes flight. This course is an invitation to let go and play music together in a way that feels rare and deeply alive – an experience beyond performance, beyond effort. It is an experiential meditation in precision, discipline, and awareness, where sound and silence become gateways to presence.

"If the drummer is good and really knows how to create an atmosphere through the drumbeat, nobody can be there without being affected. Even a Buddha would like to dance." – Osho

Jul 24 - 26, 2026 ~ with Hansa, Nivedano, Punitama

events.title: OSHO Reminding Yourself of the Forgotten Language of Talking to Your BodyMind - 7 Days
events.venue: OSHO International Meditation Resort, 17 Koregaon Park, Pune, Maharashtra
events.description: Treat body with gratitude and trust, befriend its intelligence.
events.full_text:
OSHO Reminding Yourself of the Forgotten Language of Talking to Your BodyMind - 7 Days

Treat your body with gratitude and trust, it is your friend and companion. This seven-day course, lasting one hour per day, invites you in deep relaxation to tune into your "bodymind." You will learn to befriend and trust its intelligence, and find new solutions for optimal health, balance, and well-being. The course meets from 7.30 am to 8.30 am over seven days. The process can be continued or refreshed at any time.

"The body is the most complex mechanism in existence – it is simply marvelous. And blessed are those who marvel." – Osho

Jul 24 - 30, 2026 ~ with Richa

events.title: Mindfulness and Moving - Mentastics - 1 Day
events.venue: OSHO International Meditation Resort, 17 Koregaon Park, Pune, Maharashtra
events.description: Alignment, ease, lightness through meditative movement.
events.full_text:
Mindfulness and Moving - Mentastics - 1 Day

Discover alignment, ease, and lightness through meditative movement and breath. Mindfulness and Moving – Mentastics invites you into a gentle exploration of movement and awareness. Through playful, meditative exercises, tension softens and the body's natural rhythm reawakens. Each movement becomes an invitation to experience balance, vitality, and inner spaciousness – a living bridge between motion and stillness, body and meditation.

"The really healthy person is not stuck anywhere, he is not stagnant. He is dynamic. He can be in great action and yet he can remain inactive. He knows the way of wu-wei, he knows the way of action through inaction. You will have to learn that." – Osho

Jul 25, 2026 ~ with Satsavya

events.title: A Day for the Heart
events.venue: OSHO International Meditation Resort, 17 Koregaon Park, Pune, Maharashtra
events.description: Beyond mind and thought - the heart knows.
events.full_text:
A Day for the Heart

Beyond mind, beyond thought – the heart knows. Take a break from the constant nagging of the head with its judgments, criticism, doubts, and fears, and relax into the stillness of the heart. The heart offers a gentle refuge from the overactive mind. In this day of relaxation and reconnection, you will discover how to shift from the head into the heart – where presence, love, and simplicity reside.

"Rather than questioning, you should start moving toward the heart. That is the true rebelliousness, love revolting against logic. And then from love to being is a very simple, very joyful way. It is a garden path full of roses." – Osho

Jul 26, 2026 ~ with Sadhana

events.title: Celebrating the New Woman - 1 Day
events.venue: OSHO International Meditation Resort, 17 Koregaon Park, Pune, Maharashtra
events.description: Rejoice in feminine energies and celebrate being a woman.
events.full_text:
Celebrating the New Woman - 1 Day

Rejoice in your feminine energies, celebrate being a woman. Open the door to the mystic feminine within: dancing in our feminine energies and expressing them freely through movement, we become aware of the joy and freedom they bring to our lives. This gathering of women is a loving and supportive space to explore – and let go of – the ways we have learned to cut ourselves off from our inner richness.

"Rejoice in your feminine qualities, make a poetry of your feminine qualities. That is your great inheritance from nature." – Osho

Jul 29, 2026 ~ with Ambu

events.venue: OSHO International Meditation Resort, 17 Koregaon Park, Pune, Maharashtra

Awaken your intuitive insight with OSHO Zen Tarot. Using OSHO Zen Tarot cards, this is an opportunity to develop our intuition from the perspective of the here and now – the perspective of Zen. Where traditional tarot often looks to the past or tries to predict the future, OSHO Zen Tarot brings us into the present moment. Rooted in the wisdom of Zen, these cards reflect our inner world – our thoughts, feelings, and energies – as they are right now. Aug 1, 2026 ~ with Sadhana

events.title: From Sound to Silence and Silence to Song - 1 Day
events.venue: OSHO International Meditation Resort, 17 Koregaon Park, Pune, Maharashtra
events.description: Exploring your inner music and hidden source of treasure.
events.full_text:
From Sound to Silence and Silence to Song - 1 Day

Exploring your inner music: "the hidden source of treasure in every human heart". Inspired by insights and meditation techniques from The Voice of Silence, you are invited to discover and experience new dimensions of silence and sound – the ever-present "soundless sound," the basis of all life, and the "song of life," the unique melody found deep within every heart. This course aims to support, enrich, and deepen your experience of meditation and creativity. No previous musical skills or knowledge are needed or required – just yourself and your "hidden source of treasure."

"Listen to the song of life. The first condition for listening is that you begin by listening for it in your heart. Without this, the outer music will not be heard." – Osho

Aug 2, 2026 ~ with Satyam

events.title: OSHO Book of Secrets Meditations and Facilitating - 4 Days
events.venue: OSHO International Meditation Resort, 17 Koregaon Park, Pune, Maharashtra
events.description: Explore 112 ancient meditation techniques for consciousness.
events.full_text:
OSHO Book of Secrets Meditations and Facilitating - 4 Days

112 Keys for awareness and to the mystery within. Explore, and learn to share, the meditations from OSHO The Book of Secrets – 112 ancient techniques for consciousness. Diving deeply into selected techniques, the focus will be on both personal exploration and facilitation skills. You will work with methods rooted in breath, the senses, silence, and inner energy – while learning how to hold space where others can safely and meaningfully experience them.

"These techniques are so simple that you can achieve all that is possible for human consciousness at any moment you decide to achieve it." – Osho

Aug 8 - 11, 2026 ~ with Sudheer, Dhyan

Aug 9, 2026 ~ with Satsavya

events.title: The Aliveness Blast - Morning Mini Course
events.venue: OSHO International Meditation Resort, 17 Koregaon Park, Pune, Maharashtra
events.description: Wake up to new life with expanded energy and vitality.
events.full_text:
The Aliveness Blast - Morning Mini Course

Wake up to a new life in The Aliveness Blast! Expand your energy and enjoy your new life with vitality and the creation of overflowing energy in your body and being. Bring a fresh breath to your life with the new, radiant, vertical full-breath techniques. Open confidence, courage and inner light to create a more meaningful, adventurous and meditative path of fulfilment in life. Experience joy, warmth and heartfelt connections at every moment. Come and awaken new energy! Do not let life pass by unlived! Start living right now!

"You have not been in contact with yourself for so long, for many lives. You are alienated from yourself, you have become a stranger to yourself because of this repressive attitude." – Osho

Aug 11, 2026 ~ with Veet Mano, Usha
